title: Vileda Sprint 3-Tier Clothes Airer, Indoor Clothes Drying Rack with 15 m Washing Line
features: The Vileda 3-Tier Clothes Airer with 15 metres of drying space can hold up to 1 wash load at a time. Making it perfect for small homes and wash loads
This silver, indoor clothes drying rack features a sturdy frame that folds with ease for convenient storage
The non-slip feet prevent the clothes horse from leaving scratches on all hard floors
The drying rack comes with the space to hang shirts and delicate items, with the four hooks specifically designed to hold hangers
It can hold up to 9.6 kg of laundry at a time, making it ideal for smaller wash loads of laundry
description: From the manufacturer Vileda Sprint 15m Indoor Airer Our best selling indoor airer in the UK! Benefits Line length of 15m 4 extra hanging hooks for clothes hangers Ideal if you don’t have much space 3 Year Warrranty Vileda Sprint 15 3-Tier Indoor Airer The Vileda Sprint 15 is a steel 3 tier airer with an easy to use opening and closing mechanism. With a line length of 15m and 4 extra hanging hooks for clothes hangers. Size when assembled: 61.5cm wide x 54cm deep x 143 cm high Open and Close Bar Easy opening and closing mechanism. Simply open the airer and slot the bar into position to erect. Lift the bar to close. Non-Slip Feet This airer has non-slip feet and helps to prevent any scratching on hard floors. Easy to store Sprint 15 compactly folds and is easy to store. Space Saving The open dimensions are W61.5xD54xH143cm. Closed dimensions are W61xD6xH80cm.
